=== search tools ===

https://www.shodan.io/ => list of internet connected devices and services in those devices, it has many filters available for search, also has a [[https://cli.shodan.io/|cli interface]]

https://domain.glas => Contains info about the DNS of a website an some info associated with the owners of the DNS

https://buckets.grayhatwarfare.com/ => search engine for S3 buckets and its files
